summary:
The patient has a GCS score expressed as E2 VT3 due to being intubated which affects their ability to verbally respond but allows for assessment through other means; thus,
the overall calculated composite score remains at six considering standard scoring rules adjusted appropriately based upon specific conditions such as mechanical ventilation leading to altered responsiveness levels across different domains measured within the scale framework itself:
